use_cases: Right-click context actions for desktop applications and websites
Nested menu navigation with submenus for hierarchical actions
Radio group selections within context menus for multi-option choices
Accessible keyboard and screen reader navigation for all menu items
Trigger-based menu activation on specific UI elements
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible context menu component built with Radix UI primitives. Features nested submenus, radio groups, checkable items, and keyboard navigation support. Uses standard Tailwind CSS styling with accent colors and rounded corners, making it ideal for SaaS dashboards, code editors, and productivity tools requiring right-click functionality.
